name: Outpatient Follow-Up Visit Procedure Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for outpatient follow-up visits including office visits (new and established patients), preventive medicine visits, and telehealth consultations. Used in follow-up after hospitalization (FUH), transitions of care (TRC), follow-up after ED visit (FUM/FUA), and various care management measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
